intended_use: The ZEUS System (Zio Watch), as part of the Zio Watch Service, is intended to process and analyze electrocardiogram (ECG) and photoplethysmogram (PPG) based data to detect and report on the presence o
intended_use_full: The ZEUS System (Zio Watch), as part of the Zio Watch Service, is intended to process and analyze electrocardiogram (ECG) and photoplethysmogram (PPG) based data to detect and report on the presence of Atrial Fibrillation (AF) over the monitoring period. The report provides ECG information for the intended user to diagnose AF and contextual information for AF, both to be interpreted based on clinical judgment and experience. It is indicated for use on adult patients 22 years or older who are susceptible to developing or who have been diagnosed with AF. It is not intended for use on critical care patients.
ground_truth: For ACE algorithm: ECG-based, CCT-reviewed reference rhythm labels obtained from reference Zio XT Patches worn simultaneously. For ECGDL algorithm: Certified Cardiographic Technician (CCT) review of training data from Zio devices.
